DocumentationExampleCode.Code: meta import csv .\demo-csv\products.csv --entity Product --new-workspace .\Workspace meta import csv ..\demo-csv\suppliers.csv --entity Supplier meta import csv ..\demo-csv\categories.csv --entity Category meta import csv ..\demo-csv\warehouses.csv --entity Warehouse meta import csv ..\demo-csv\orders.csv --entity Order meta model suggest --print-commands meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.ProductId --target Product --lookup Id meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.SupplierId --target Supplier --lookup Id meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id

meta-cli new-workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --application app-my-cli --standard-cli-shapes --default-help meta-cli add-command --workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --id cmd-show --application app-my-cli --name show --token show --description "Show the workspace." meta-cli add-executable-command --workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --id exec-show --command cmd-show meta-cli add-option --workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --parameter-id param-show-workspace --option-id option-show-workspace --executable-command exec-show --name workspace --value-shape shape-path --token-id token-show-workspace --token --workspace --description "Workspace path."
cd MetaDocs\Docs\SuiteWorkspace meta-docs browse meta-docs browse cli/meta-docs meta-docs browse model/MetaDocs meta-docs search deploy
@' render-site --workspace ..\SuiteWorkspace --out ..\Site '@ | meta-mesh add-step --operation regenerate-public-docs --name render-site --executable meta-docs --arguments-stdin --working-directory .
cd MetaDocs\Docs\Documentation.MetaMesh meta-mesh validate --operation regenerate-public-docs meta-mesh run --operation regenerate-public-docs

meta-weave new-workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace meta-weave add-model --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --alias Source --model SourceModel --workspace-path .\Source.Workspace meta-weave add-model --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --alias Target --model TargetModel --workspace-path .\Target.Workspace meta-weave add-binding --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --name CustomerName --source-model Source --source-entity Customer --source-property Name --target-model Target --target-entity Customer --target-property CustomerName meta-weave check --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace meta-weave materialize --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --model TargetModel --new-workspace .\Materialized.Workspace
